parameters.query:
SELECT jsonb_build_object(
 'period_start', (now()::date - 7),
 'period_end', now()::date,
 'signals', COALESCE((SELECT jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object(
     'type', s.type, 'summary', s.summary, 'quote', left(s.quote, 240),
     'band', s.details->>'band', 'category', s.details->>'risk_category',
     'networks', s.details->>'networks_total', 'account', a.name,
     'status', s.status, 'created', s.created_at::date))
   FROM signals s LEFT JOIN accounts a ON a.id = s.account_id
   WHERE s.created_at > now() - interval '7 days'), '[]'::jsonb),
 'unresolved_risks', COALESCE((SELECT jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object(
     'summary', s.summary, 'account', a.name, 'age_days', (now()::date - s.created_at::date)))
   FROM signals s LEFT JOIN accounts a ON a.id = s.account_id
   WHERE s.type = 'risk' AND s.status = 'new' AND s.created_at < now() - interval '14 days'), '[]'::jsonb),
 'calls_this_week', (SELECT count(*) FROM calls WHERE call_date > now() - interval '7 days'),
 'accounts_active', (SELECT count(DISTINCT account_id) FROM calls WHERE call_date > now() - interval '7 days' AND account_id IS NOT NULL),
 'weekly_report_rags', COALESCE((SELECT jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object(
     'project', w.project_title, 'account', w.account_name, 'rag', w.rag))
   FROM weekly_reports w WHERE w.week_ending > now() - interval '10 days'), '[]'::jsonb),
 'open_pipeline', (SELECT jsonb_build_object('deals', count(*), 'value', COALESCE(sum(amount),0)) FROM deals WHERE is_open)
) AS ctx;

parameters.content:
## tnAI weekly brief (Leadership OS)
Every Monday 07:50 (after recon 07:00, org sync 07:10, HubSpot 07:30): rolls up the past 7 days - signals with quotes, unresolved 14+ day risks, RAG mix, call volume, open pipeline - and writes the MD's three-section brief (what's happening / why / what needs you). Stored in `briefs`; the dashboard reads the latest via /api/brief.

**Run the db/2026-07_leadership_os.sql migration first.** Manual 'Run' trigger = regenerate on demand.
